quotes.quote: The Ideator generates candidate approaches based on the PI brief, scores them on novelty and feasibility, and distributes the top-ranked proposals across parallel branches of the Parallel Explore-Exploit (PEE) orchestrator.
quotes.rationale: An internal ideation-stage scorer judging novelty and feasibility whose ranking gates which proposals enter the parallel search.

quotes.quote: CoE Integrity Audit addresses some of these blind spots but is itself limited to structural integrity, not scientific novelty or significance.
quotes.rationale: The packet states the downstream audit does not cover novelty or significance, so this ideation novelty score has no reported validation.

quotes.quote: Each branch runs an isolated cycle: a Solver agent iterates up to E evaluated versions per node, with a task-specific evaluator scoring each submission. At each iteration, the top-K branches are retained, and the remaining slots are filled with new branches derived from these top performers via fresh ideation.
quotes.rationale: A task-specific scoring evaluator whose scores drive iterative solver revision and top-K branch retention, i.e. closed search control.

quotes.quote: Runs that crashed due to infrastructure issues (API timeouts, rate limits, LaTeX compilation errors) were re-attempted with fresh state, up to 3 attempts per run. No run was re-attempted to improve solver scores.
quotes.rationale: Confirms solver scores were not selected on by retry, bounding the search-control channel's protocol.

quotes.quote: A refinement pass then consumes the verifier’s findings: an LLM rewrites flagged sentences to match their evidence sources, removes claims that cannot be supported, and strips all inline evidence annotations from the final LATEX. Only a draft with no remaining blocking violations is promoted to the final paper.
quotes.rationale: Verifier findings route into candidate revision and a blocking gate controlling promotion to the final paper.

quotes.quote: CoE Integrity Audit addresses some of these blind spots but is itself limited to structural integrity, not scientific novelty or significance.
quotes.rationale: Scopes this channel to structural integrity only, excluding novelty and significance.

quotes.quote: All I1–I3 flagged results were manually verified by human reviewers. I4 judgments were validated on a sampled basis.
quotes.rationale: Human reviewers check flagged automated judgments; the packet reports no routing of these checks back into the pipeline, so it is terminal reporting.

quotes.quote: Runs that crashed due to infrastructure issues (API timeouts, rate limits, LaTeX compilation errors) were re-attempted with fresh state, up to 3 attempts per run. No run was re-attempted to improve solver scores.
quotes.rationale: Crash/executability detection triggers a bounded re-run policy, an implemented control action distinct from scoring.

quotes.quote: No third-party system was designed for ADRS, and adaptation inevitably involves judgment calls.
quotes.rationale: Comparison against third-party systems rests on author judgment calls; the packet does not state who adjudicated or how the result is routed.

quotes.quote: Real systems papers involve problem formulation, workload characterization, multi-dataset analysis, and deployment tradeoffs that our pipeline does not attempt.
quotes.rationale: Bounds the construct assessed in any external comparison to a narrow slice of research practice.

diagnostics.consequence: Branch allocation is driven by an unvalidated self-assessed novelty score, so search may be steered by a signal with unknown discrimination.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: The Ideator generates candidate approaches based on the PI brief, scores them on novelty and feasibility, and distributes the top-ranked proposals across parallel branches of the Parallel Explore-Exploit (PEE) orchestrator.
CoE Integrity Audit addresses some of these blind spots but is itself limited to structural integrity, not scientific novelty or significance.

diagnostics.statement: Novelty and significance are scored at ideation and gate branch allocation, but no channel in the packet validates novelty: the only downstream audit is explicitly limited to structural integrity.

diagnostics.consequence: The blocking gate that promotes final papers rests on LLM verifier judgments whose per-category error rate is only partially checked, and no agreement statistics are reported.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: All I1–I3 flagged results were manually verified by human reviewers. I4 judgments were validated on a sampled basis.

A refinement pass then consumes the verifier’s findings: an LLM rewrites flagged sentences to match their evidence sources, removes claims that cannot be supported, and strips all inline evidence annotations from the final LATEX. Only a draft with no remaining blocking violations is promoted to the final paper.

diagnostics.statement: Human verification of flagged integrity results is partial (I4 only sampled) and is reported as after-the-fact checking rather than a routed input to the promotion gate.

diagnostics.consequence: External comparative claims cannot be read as independent validation, and task-performance results generalize only to the narrowed pipeline scope.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: No third-party system was designed for ADRS, and adaptation inevitably involves judgment calls.
Real systems papers involve problem formulation, workload characterization, multi-dataset analysis, and deployment tradeoffs that our pipeline does not attempt.

diagnostics.statement: The comparison to third-party systems depends on unspecified adaptation judgment calls, and the evaluated task scope is acknowledged to exclude core elements of real systems research.

diagnostics.consequence: Optimization pressure concentrates on a scoring proxy whose susceptibility to gaming or systematic error is unmeasured in the packet.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Each branch runs an isolated cycle: a Solver agent iterates up to E evaluated versions per node, with a task-specific evaluator scoring each submission. At each iteration, the top-K branches are retained, and the remaining slots are filled with new branches derived from these top performers via fresh ideation.

Runs that crashed due to infrastructure issues (API timeouts, rate limits, LaTeX compilation errors) were re-attempted with fresh state, up to 3 attempts per run. No run was re-attempted to improve solver scores.

diagnostics.statement: The task-specific solver evaluator exercises closed search control over branch retention and revision, yet the packet reports no reliability study for that evaluator.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: The Ideator generates candidate approaches based on the PI brief, scores them on novelty and feasibility, and distributes the top-ranked proposals across parallel branches of the Parallel Explore-Exploit (PEE) orchestrator.
CoE Integrity Audit addresses some of these blind spots but is itself limited to structural integrity, not scientific novelty or significance.

recommendations.proposed_action: Report a discrimination or agreement study for the ideation novelty/feasibility scorer against an independent novelty assessment, since the existing audit explicitly excludes novelty and significance.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Rank agreement significantly above chance on a pre-registered candidate sample
success_check.evidence_needed: Per-candidate paired scores with the agreement or discrimination statistic and sample size
success_check.observable: Reported concordance between ideation novelty ranks and an independent novelty judgment on the same candidate set

exact_quotes.exact_quote: All I1–I3 flagged results were manually verified by human reviewers. I4 judgments were validated on a sampled basis.

A refinement pass then consumes the verifier’s findings: an LLM rewrites flagged sentences to match their evidence sources, removes claims that cannot be supported, and strips all inline evidence annotations from the final LATEX. Only a draft with no remaining blocking violations is promoted to the final paper.

Each branch runs an isolated cycle: a Solver agent iterates up to E evaluated versions per node, with a task-specific evaluator scoring each submission. At each iteration, the top-K branches are retained, and the remaining slots are filled with new branches derived from these top performers via fresh ideation.

recommendations.proposed_action: Publish per-category error rates and human-versus-verifier agreement for the integrity verifier, including full rather than sampled auditing of the I4 category that feeds the blocking promotion gate.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Complete I4 adjudication reported with error rates bounded and stated
success_check.evidence_needed: Confusion counts per category with reviewer counts and adjudication protocol
success_check.observable: False-positive and false-negative rates of verifier flags per integrity category against exhaustive human adjudication

exact_quotes.exact_quote: No third-party system was designed for ADRS, and adaptation inevitably involves judgment calls.
Real systems papers involve problem formulation, workload characterization, multi-dataset analysis, and deployment tradeoffs that our pipeline does not attempt.

recommendations.proposed_action: Document the specific adaptation decisions made for each third-party baseline and state explicitly which research activities the evaluated scope omits when reporting comparative task-performance claims.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Every reported baseline has its adaptation choices and omitted task elements enumerated
success_check.evidence_needed: Released configuration diffs, prompts, and a scope table tied to each comparison
success_check.observable: A per-baseline adaptation log paired with an explicit scope statement accompanying comparative results

memory_structure: retained top-K branches carried across iterations as seeds for new branches
fresh-state re-attempts that discard prior run state
policy_type: parallel explore-exploit orchestration with top-K branch retention and refill via fresh ideation
bounded solver iteration up to E evaluated versions per node
blocking-violation gate governing promotion to the final paper
bounded fresh-state retry (up to 3 attempts) restricted to infrastructure crashes
